name: git-message-generator-by-arg-rabbi
displayName: Git Message Generator By ARG RABBI
description: Generate conventional commit messages for Git and GitHub repositories from staged changes in VS Code.

configuration.title: Git Message Generator By ARG RABBI

commitGen.maxHeaderLength.description: Maximum generated conventional commit header length.

commitGen.maxAnalyzedLinesPerFile.description: Maximum added/removed diff lines to keep in memory per file during analysis.

commitGen.maxContextsPerFile.description: Maximum number of extracted function/class contexts per file.

commitGen.maxRawDiffChars.description: Maximum raw diff size (characters) to parse deeply before fallback to path+metadata analysis.

commitGen.bodyMaxLines.description: Maximum number of lines to include in generated commit body.

commitGen.bodyMaxContextsPerFile.description: Maximum contexts (function/class names) to include per file in commit body.

commitGen.groupBodyByModule.description: Group commit body by module for larger multi-file changes.

commitGen.typeOverrides.description: Force a conventional commit type for matching paths. Example: { "migrations/": "feat" }

commitGen.showConfidence.description: Show confidence information after generating a message.

commitGen.includeWorkingTreeWhenNoStaged.description: Use unstaged working-tree changes when no staged changes are available.

commitGen.includeBody.description: Include a detailed multi-line body listing all changed files and their specific contexts.

commitGen.debugTelemetry.description: Emit local analysis metrics (timings and line caps) to the CommitGen Output channel.

commitGen.profile.description: Adaptive weighting profile to bias signal scoring by project type.

commitGen.autoDetectProfile.description: Automatically infer profile from current change set when profile is balanced.

commitGen.messageStyle.description: Controls verbosity of generated header/body text.

scripts.test: tsx --test test/generationEngine.integration.test.ts test/profileWeights.test.ts test/commitScorer.test.ts test/diffAnalyzer.test.ts test/messageComposer.test.ts test/scopeCore.test.ts test/goldenMessages.test.ts
